text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today. The press floods the
camp, rattling off all kinds of questions
comparing Narita Brian to Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf is unfazed, but Narita Brian's
competitive nature kicks in and she seeks to draw
Symboli Rudolf into a match.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The air between them is slowly but surely heating
up. And so, summer camp begins.
